scenario: False positive — internal codebase question does not need external web retrieval
title: Pure codebase question suppresses web retrieval — search-codebase is sufficient
user_request: How is authentication implemented in our internal repository?
suppression_reason: Internal codebase question. Triggering external web retrieval would be a false positive — search-codebase subcommand addresses this; external retrieval would return irrelevant public content.
